meta.title: Cybersecurity Is Part Of Food Protection
meta.description:
Kristin Demoranville introduces the S4 audience to food protection measures that are in place today and how we need to add cybersecurity as part of food protection. How OT security can better work with and integrate into food protection.

She gives some great examples to understand this sector, dairy farms, shipping cattle to slaughter, trail mix, and more.
